pipe_shortest_path_length: The pipe network has a unique shortest open route from junction {source_label} to junction {goal_label}. Ignoring blocked pipes, how many open pipe segments are in that route?
Using only open pipes, how many pipe segments are in the unique shortest route from {source_label} to {goal_label}?
Ignoring blocked pipes, what is the length in pipe segments of the shortest open route from junction {source_label} to junction {goal_label}?
Find the unique shortest route through open pipes from {source_label} to {goal_label}. How many open pipe segments does it use?
How many open pipe segments lie on the unique shortest open route from junction {source_label} to junction {goal_label}?
pipe_bridge_count: How many open pipes are bridges, meaning removing that single open pipe would disconnect part of the open network?
Count the open pipe segments whose removal would split the connected open-pipe network.
What is the number of bridge pipes in the open pipe network?
How many open pipe segments are critical connections that disconnect the network if removed?
Count open pipes that are the only connection between two parts of the open network.
pipe_exact_distance_count: How many junctions have shortest open-pipe distance exactly {query_distance} segments from junction {query_label}?
Using only open pipes, count junctions exactly {query_distance} segments away from {query_label}.
What is the number of junctions at open-pipe distance {query_distance} from {query_label}?
Ignoring blocked pipes, how many junctions are exactly {query_distance} pipe segments from {query_label}?
Count the junctions whose shortest open route from {query_label} uses exactly {query_distance} pipe segments.
pipe_reachable_junction_count: How many junctions, including junction {query_label} itself, are reachable from {query_label} using only open pipes?
Using only open pipes, count all junctions reachable from {query_label}, including {query_label}.
Ignoring blocked pipes, how many junctions can be reached from junction {query_label}?
From {query_label}, how many junctions are in the same open-pipe connected region, including the start junction?
Count the junctions reachable through open pipes from {query_label}, including {query_label} itself.

code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a labeled pipe-junction network with open pipes and blocked pipes (blocked pipes are marked with a red X)
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count or length as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_shortest_path_length: set "annotation" to an ordered array of [x,y] pixel points at junction centers along the unique shortest open route from {source_label} to {goal_label}, including both endpoints
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_bridge_count: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is an [x, y] pixel point at a junction center of one open pipe whose removal disconnects part of the open network; use [] when the answer is zero
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_exact_distance_count: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all junctions whose shortest open-pipe distance from {query_label} is exactly {query_distance} segments
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_reachable_count: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all junctions reachable from {query_label} through open pipes, including {query_label} itself
